title: rubus reclinatus
intro: Rubus reclinatus, also known as the creeping raspberry, is a type of bramble plant that belongs to the Rubus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus reclinatus include supporting cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements to support overall well-being.
